SETUP_PASSWORD.description: Password required to access the /setup onboarding UI (set by deployer).

INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN.description: Shared internal token for trusted web<->core API calls.

OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN.description: Bearer token used by wrapper/proxy to authenticate gateway traffic.

OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR.description: Persistent directory for OpenClaw state, credentials, and runtime config.

OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR.description: Configured OpenClaw workspace path inside the container. Template defaults this to the persistent Railway volume so SFTP lands in the same directory OpenClaw uses.

OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_VOLUME_DIR.description: Physical Railway volume path that backs the active OpenClaw workspace.

RAILWAY_RUN_UID.description: Run process as UID 0 to ensure write access to mounted Railway volume paths.

SFTPGO_ENABLED.description: Enable embedded SFTPGo service for secure book/content upload.

SFTPGO_DATA_ROOT.description: Persistent root directory for SFTPGo data, keys, and user storage.

SFTPGO_SFTPD__BINDINGS__0__PORT.description: TCP port for SFTP protocol endpoint.

SFTPGO_HTTPD__BINDINGS__0__PORT.description: HTTP admin API/UI port for SFTPGo (internal by default).

SFTPGO_DATA_PROVIDER__CREATE_DEFAULT_ADM.description: Automatically create initial SFTPGo admin on first boot.

SFTPGO_DEFAULT_ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Username for the default SFTPGo admin account. Portable SFTP mode reuses this username unless SFTPGO_PORTABLE_USERNAME is explicitly set.

SFTPGO_DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the default SFTPGo admin account (auto-generated secret). Portable SFTP mode reuses this password unless SFTPGO_PORTABLE_PASSWORD is explicitly set.

SFTPGO_PORTABLE_USERNAME.description: Optional override for portable SFTP username. Leave blank to reuse SFTPGO_DEFAULT_ADMIN_USERNAME.

SFTPGO_PORTABLE_PASSWORD.description: Optional override for portable SFTP password. Leave blank to reuse SFTPGO_DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD.

SFTPGO_PORTABLE_DIRECTORY.description: Directory exposed via SFTP portable mode. Keep this aligned with OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR so SFTP sessions land in the active OpenClaw workspace.

INTERNAL_GATEWAY_HOST.description: Local host address where OpenClaw gateway process listens.

INTERNAL_GATEWAY_PORT.description: Local port where OpenClaw gateway process listens.

OPENCLAW_ENTRY.description: Path to OpenClaw runtime entrypoint script inside container image.

OPENCLAW_NODE.description: Node.js executable used to launch OpenClaw runtime.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_BACKEND.description: OpenClaw memory backend (`qmd` to enable QMD sidecar retrieval, `sqlite` for builtin manager).

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_COMMAND.description: QMD executable path used when `OPENCLAW_MEMORY_BACKEND=qmd`. Railway should use the direct @tobilu/qmd entrypoint.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_UPDATE_INTERVAL.description: QMD refresh cadence for memory ingestion updates.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_INDEX_WORKSPACE.description: If true, the wrapper adds workspace-wide QMD collections so memory_search can recall more than MEMORY.md and memory/*.md.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_WORKSPACE_PATTERN.description: Glob used for workspace-wide QMD collections under memory.qmd.paths.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_WAIT_FOR_BOOT_SYNC.description: If false, OpenClaw does not block startup waiting for QMD boot sync.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_INCLUDE_DEFAULT_MEMO.description: Include MEMORY.md plus memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md files in QMD collections.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_QUERY_TIMEOUT_MS.description: QMD search timeout in milliseconds for Railway runtime memory_search calls. Keep this high enough for first-query model warmup.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_UPDATE_TIMEOUT_MS.description: QMD update timeout in milliseconds for Railway bootstrap and background sync.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_EMBED_TIMEOUT_MS.description: QMD embed timeout in milliseconds so first-run local model warmups can finish on Railway.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_QMD_WARMUP_QUERY.description: Best-effort boot query used to pull QMD query-time models into cache before live traffic.

OPENCLAW_CONTROL_UI_ALLOW_INSECURE_AUTH.description: Compatibility toggle for Railway-hosted Control UI/WebChat so the wrapper's injected bearer auth can be used without device pairing.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_PROVIDER.description: Default Railway memory-search provider. Keep `local` for deterministic no-secret embeddings, or intentionally override to `openai`, `gemini`, or `voyage`.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_FALLBACK.description: Fallback provider for agents.defaults.memorySearch.fallback. Keep `none` for deterministic Railway boot unless you intentionally chain providers.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_OPENAI_MODEL.description: Embedding model used when memory search resolves to the OpenAI provider.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH.description: Local embedding model URI/path used when memory search resolves to the local provider.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_LOCAL_MODEL_CACHE.description: Persistent cache directory for local node-llama-cpp embedding models.

OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_STORE_PATH.description: Persistent semantic memory store path template. `{agentId}` is materialized per OpenClaw agent.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional. Only required when OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_PROVIDER=openai or models.providers.openai.apiKey is not defined elsewhere.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Optional. Only required when OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_PROVIDER=gemini or models.providers.gemini.apiKey is not defined elsewhere.

VOYAGE_API_KEY.description: Optional. Only required when OPENCLAW_MEMORY_SEARCH_PROVIDER=voyage or models.providers.voyage.apiKey is not defined elsewhere.

BOOK_SOURCE_MODE.description: Book ingestion mode (external volume/SFTP-based source by default).

BOOK_SOURCE_DIR.description: Filesystem directory containing source book content for ingestion.

BOOK_IMPORT_MANIFEST.description: Path to manifest file describing book import inputs and structure.

BOOK_IMPORT_ENABLED.description: Enable automatic import job execution on startup.

BOOK_IMPORT_DRY_RUN.description: Validate import pipeline without writing permanent data.
